_meta.purpose: Reference taxonomy for classifying EN->DE patent translation errors from scorecard reviews.
_meta.consistency: existing.function maps to linter.py function names.

werden_dynamic.description: Flags wird/wurde*/werden/geworden* -- double-check static state vs dynamic process.
werden_dynamic.false_positive_risk: high -- many fires unrelated to stative/eventive issue

preposition_contraction.description: Flags im/vom/am/beim/zum/zur contractions; should be in dem/von dem etc.

regular_space_before_unit.description: Flags regular space before unit; should be non-breaking space (Alt+0160).

hyphen_in_number_range.description: Flags hyphen between digits; number ranges require en dash (Alt+0150).

welche_relativpronomen.description: Flags welche* as relative pronoun; use der/die/das instead.

plurality_not_transferred.description: Source-triggered: plurality count in EN must match Vielzahl count in DE.

same_selbe.description: Flags dieselbe*/derselbe* in DE when EN has same -- should be gleiche.

comprise_umfassen.description: Target-triggered: umfass* count in DE must match compris* count in EN.

german_claim_no_article.description: Flags German article at start of a claim preamble.

betraegt_stative.description: Flags betraegt/betragen in DE -- static values should use ist/sind.

in_response_to_mistranslated.description: Flags in Reaktion in DE when EN has in response to -- correct: als Reaktion auf.

same_gleich_missing.description: Flags absence of gleich* in DE when EN has same.

target_punctuation_where_none_in_source.description: Flags punctuation at end of DE absent from EN.
target_punctuation_where_none_in_source.false_positive_risk: medium -- abbreviation periods trigger false fires

negation_not_transferred.description: Flags when not/no/none count in EN exceeds nicht/kein count in DE.

beide_ambiguous.description: Flags beide* in DE as ambiguous (zwei / either / both).

vielzahl_plurality.description: Target-triggered: Vielzahl count in DE must match plurality count in EN.

acronym_in_compound.description: Flags wrong acronym/hyphen placement: (AKR-) or space before/after hyphen with acronym in parens. Correct form: (AKR)-Word.

hyphen_in_long_compound.description: Flags hyphen between two words of 10+ chars -- likely unnecessary compound hyphen (Style Guide 3.10).

folgendes_umfasst.description: Flags umfasst: before a list without Folgendes. Correct: Folgendes umfasst:.

folgendes_konfiguriert.description: Flags konfiguriert ist: before a list without zu Folgendem. Correct: zu Folgendem konfiguriert ist:.

abbreviation_not_in_source.description: Flags d. h./z. B./bzw. in DE when EN spells out (that is/for example/respectively).

jeweilig_not_respective.description: Flags jeweilig* in DE when EN source has no respective/respectively.

german_quotation_marks.description: Flags straight double quotes in DE target -- use German quotation marks (U+201E open, U+201C close, Alt+0132/Alt+0147).

patent_number_decimal.description: Flags decimal comma in patent Nr. when EN source has decimal point. Patent numbers are identifiers, not values.

schritt_zum.description: Flags Schritt zum [Infinitiv] -- should be Schritt eines [Genitiv-Infinitiv] (method step nominalization).

durch_verwendung.description: Flags durch Verwendung (always wrong) and durch [X-ung] when EN has by [verb]ing -- use nominalized verb instead.
durch_verwendung.false_positive_risk: low for durch_verwendung; medium for broader durch-ung pattern

linter_new:article_first_mention.description: Definite article (der/die/das) used on the first mention of a term; should be indefinite or none. Applies especially to nominalized verbs (das Bestimmen -> Bestimmen or ein Bestimmen).
linter_new:article_first_mention.pattern: Detect das/die/der before a capitalized infinitive in DE; flag on first occurrence only.
linter_new:article_first_mention.implementation_note: Requires segment-level state. Approximation: flag das/die/der before capitalized infinitives (-en ending, uppercase) when no prior occurrence in same segment.

linter_new:nominalization.description: Result noun (-ung) where a nominalized verb (-en) is required. Partially implemented via schritt_zum and durch_verwendung.
linter_new:nominalization.pattern: EN gerund (-ing used as noun) + DE result noun (-ung, -stellung etc.) in corresponding position.
linter_new:nominalization.implementation_note: Partially implemented: schritt_zum covers Schritt zum [Infinitiv], durch_verwendung covers durch Verwendung and durch [X-ung]. Remaining: general result-noun to nominalized-verb detection requires morphological analysis or lookup table.

linter_new:genitive_separation.description: Genitive object incorrectly separated from governing verb by intervening adverbials. Decision: leave for human reviewers.
linter_new:genitive_separation.example_error: Empfangen, durch das UE, einer Praembel
linter_new:genitive_separation.example_correction: Empfangen einer Praembel durch das UE
linter_new:genitive_separation.implementation_note: Decided not to implement -- recognisable to human reviewers, automation false-positive risk too high.

glossary:apparatus_device.description: apparatus->Einrichtung, device->Vorrichtung (when both appear in patent).

glossary:comprise.description: comprising->umfassend preferred; comprise->umfassen. Relative clause accepted but participial preferred.

glossary:include.description: include/including -> aufweisen or beinhalten (NOT umfassen). NOTE: in at least one project (26_0512_5305) the reviewer instead required einschliessen/eingeschlossen for include/including/included, with beinhalten flagged as the error -- term mapping appears to be project-glossary-dependent, not fixed across all patents.

glossary:is_are_value.description: is/are for value/state -> ist/sind (NOT betraegt, liegt, steht, befindet sich).

glossary:configured_to.description: configured to -> konfiguriert, um (NOT so/dazu konfiguriert ist, dass).

glossary:form.description: form (verb) -> bilden or ausbilden (NOT formen, verlaufen).

glossary:other.description: Other glossary mismatches: process->Vorgang, portion->Abschnitt, surface->Oberflaeche, such as->wie, at least->mindestens.

manual:accuracy.description: Content accuracy: omissions, additions, wrong meaning. Not automatable.

manual:consistency.description: Term inconsistency within patent. Requires patent-wide context.

manual:word_order.description: Verb/clause position in subordinate clauses. Hard to automate without syntactic parsing.

manual:article.description: Wrong article choice not covered by linter_new:article_first_mention.

manual:terminology.description: Domain-specific term requiring research. Not automatable.

manual:punctuation.description: Comma, colon placement per German grammar.

manual:other.description: Typos, spacing, capitalisation, preferential style choices.
